---
title: "PSYC101 Awesome Sauce"
subtitle: "Interactive course materials for General Psychology"
---

Welcome. This site is a draft space for custom PSYC101 materials.

The first chapter is an integrated learning-science unit:

## [How Studying Works](how-studying-works.qmd)

**Attention, Memory, Sleep, and Learning**

This chapter explains why studying often feels productive without producing durable learning. It integrates core PSYC101 concepts from consciousness, memory, sleep, and learning.

Core through-line:

> Attention selects → memory encodes → retrieval strengthens → spacing stabilizes → sleep consolidates → reinforcement shapes habits.

::: {.callout-note title="Draft status"}
This is an early draft. The text is intentionally complete enough to read, but interactives and polish will be added after the narrative structure is stable.
:::
